CustomField.description:
Drafted by the individual, before the end of year review with the line manager - a short text summary of progress against objectives and general comments on performance and development over the year.
Note the individual should also draft the end of year review status against the performance and development objectives in the table above - this input will form the basis for the individual/line manager conversation and agreement. The individual should expect that the line manager will challenge the proposed end of year status against the SMART objectives.
Individual comments may be amended in the end of year review on agreement between individual and line manager - comments should only be shared outside of that conversation once they have been agreed.
Ideas or actions for next year may be suggested here, but should be formalised in the following years Expectations Exchange
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Drafted by the individual, before the end of year review with the line manager - a short text summary of progress against objectives and general comments on performance and development over the year.
CustomField.label: End-of-Year Review - Individual Comments
